summary: Raw podium event recording: Dr. Mehmet Oz (CMS Administrator) speaks at a presidential lectern with Trump standing beside him in front of a TrumpRx.gov backdrop, touting drug-price transparency. Static single-camera framing with a long uninterrupted talking transcript and no music, cinematic editing, or genre styling. Out of scope: a lightly-edited speech/press event, not youth-appeal music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: TrumpRx.gov; Seal of the President of the United States
